backend/main.mo: Main actor defining user profiles, notes, study groups, quizzes, and viva questions with CRUD operations, authorization checks, premium user validation, and migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old UserProfile records (4 fields) to new UserProfile records (7 fields) by adding optional bio, yearOfStudy, and department fields.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented features: profile page route creation, navigation link addition, and profile UI updates with new customizable fields.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-existing summaries of frontend files including App.tsx with profile route, Layout with profile link, ProfilePage, hooks for user profile management, and styling files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes, including custom properties for sidebar, charts, and UI components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag, 'Student Vibe' title, root div, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with TanStack Router setup for all routes including /profile, splash screen on startup, and ProfileSetupModal for first-time authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/DashboardCard.ts: Reusable card component for dashboard tiles with icon, title, description, hover effects, gradient backgrounds, and click handler.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero banner component displaying generated hero image with gradient overlay and 'Study Smarter with AI' headline text.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component with responsive navigation header, mobile menu, logo, and authenticated user navigation items (Dashboard, Upload, Browse, Study Groups, Profile). Renders child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button component that toggles between login and logout states, handles Internet Identity authentication flow, and clears query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal form for first-time user profile setup, collecting name, email, and college information with loading state during submission.
frontend/src/components/SplashScreen.tsx: Animated splash screen with three-phase animation (fade-in, hold, fade-out) displaying the app logo and name before calling onComplete callback.
frontend/src/components/SubscriptionCard: Displays free and premium subscription tiers with feature lists, handles Stripe checkout session creation for premium upgrades at ₹69/month.
frontend/src/components/UserProfileDispl: Displays authenticated user's avatar with initials, name, college, and premium badge in a compact card format.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, initializes access control, and invalidates dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateCheckoutSess: Mutation hook that creates a Stripe checkout session via the backend actor with shopping items and success/cancel URLs.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateStudyGroup.t: Mutation hook for creating study groups with id, name, and description, invalidating the studyGroups query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend actor, with proper loading and enabled states.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsStripeConfigured: React Query hook that checks if Stripe payment integration is configured on the backend canister.
frontend/src/hooks/useJoinStudyGroup.ts: React Query mutation hook for joining a study group, invalidating related queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching notes, study groups, quizzes, viva questions, and user profiles from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook for saving the current user's profile, invalidating the user profile cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveQuiz.ts: React Query mutation hook for saving quiz questions by ID, invalidating quiz queries on success.
React Query mutation hook for saving viva questions for a subject, invalidating viva question queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useUploadNote.ts: React Query mutation hook for uploading note files with metadata, converting files to ExternalBlob format and invalidating notes cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom purple-blue gradient theme, OKLCH color variables for light/dark modes, and utility classes for glow effects, animations, and glassmorphism.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, rendering the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/BrowseNotesPage.tsx: Page component for browsing and searching notes by subject, topic, or college with filtering and download functionality.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying user profile, navigation cards for key features (upload, browse, groups, AI), and subscription plan information.
frontend/src/pages/GroupDetailPage.tsx: Page component displaying detailed information about a specific study group including name, description, and member list.
frontend/src/pages/NoteDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed information about a specific note including metadata (topic, subject, semester, college), download button, and AI study tool options (summary, quiz, viva). Includes navigation back to browse page and loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: Shows a payment failure message with an error icon and provides buttons to retry payment or return to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: Displays a success message after premium subscription payment, lists premium benefits (unlimited uploads, AI capabilities, priority support, analytics), and provides a button to navigate to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Allows authenticated users to view and edit their profile information including name, email, college, bio, year of study, and department. Includes form validation, character limits, and saves profile data using mutations.
frontend/src/pages/QuizPage.tsx: Placeholder page for quiz generation feature that displays a message indicating the feature requires premium subscription and external AI service integration.
frontend/src/pages/StudyGroupsPage.tsx: Manages study groups with a list view and creation form that allows users to create new study groups with name and description, then navigates to the created group's detail page.
frontend/src/pages/UploadNotePage.tsx: Provides a form for uploading notes with file selection (PDF, DOC, images up to 10MB), metadata fields (subject, topic, semester, college), and displays a free tier upload limit warning for non-premium users.
frontend/src/pages/VivaPage.tsx: Placeholder page for viva question generation that displays a message indicating the feature requires premium subscription and external AI service integration for generating oral exam practice questions.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, border radius variables, glow/neon shadow effects, and custom animations for accordion and floating elements.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing Student Vibe as a college notes sharing platform with AI study features, Internet Identity authentication, Stripe payments, and listing 10 implemented features including notes upload, AI summaries, quiz generation, and study groups.
